name: How do I file a workers comp claim after machine accident at work?
description: Report to employer immediately, file Form 12 with Utah Labor Commission, provide evidence.

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim after machine accident at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer immediately, file Form 12 with Utah Labor Commission, provide evidence.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Notify your employer in writing within days, then file Form 12 with the Utah Labor Commission within one year.** Your employer must provide medical care and report to their insurer[1][4]. Provide incident details, medical records. Insurer investigates; attend any hearing. Track all treatment. Hire an attorney if disputed.
